---
title: "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf"
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">

  <a href="index.html" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#6b7280; text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.06em;">← Praticiens</a>

  <div style="margin-top:2rem; margin-bottom:2rem; padding-bottom:2rem; border-bottom:1px solid #1e2128;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Data Engineer · 🇨🇮 Abidjan</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.5rem); font-weight:800; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">Diakité Mamadou Youssouf</h1>
    <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.8; max-width:600px;">
      Fondateur de from0tohero.dev. 1100+ apprenants formés en Data Engineering dans 40+ pays.
    </p>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; margin-top:1.25rem;">
      <a href="https://github.com/diakite-data" target="_blank"
         style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/diakite" target="_blank"
         style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:1rem;">// stack</p>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">Python</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">Airflow</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">dbt</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">Spark</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">GCP</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:2px;">Kafka</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div>
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:1rem;">// réalisations</p>
    <a href="../realisations/index.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
           onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">
        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#60a5fa; border:1px solid #60a5fa22; background:#60a5fa0d; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">DATA</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">Bootcamp</span>
        </div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0;">Data Engineering Bootcamp</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">35 modules · 1100+ apprenants · 40+ pays. Le bootcamp Data Engineering complet en français.</p>
        <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">Python</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">Airflow</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">dbt</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">Spark</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">GCP</span>
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">Kafka</span>
        </div>
        <a href="https://diakite-data.github.io/data-engineering-bootcamp/" target="_blank"
           style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#f0a500; text-decoration:none;">Demo →</a>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

</div>
```
